nozzles: Deck gun with solid bore tip at 80 PSI nozzle pressure

problems.title: Deck Gun Flow: 1 1/4-inch Solid Bore
problems.question: Engine 181 is operating its deck gun with a 1 1/4-inch solid bore tip. Use 80 PSI nozzle pressure. What GPM is flowing from the deck gun?
problems.instructorExplanation: This is a deck gun solid bore flow problem, not a pump-pressure problem. Use the solid bore flow formula. With a 1 1/4-inch solid bore tip at 80 PSI nozzle pressure, the deck gun is flowing 415 GPM.
problems.explainMistake: Common mistakes include using the pump-pressure formula instead of the solid bore flow formula, forgetting to square the tip diameter, using 50 PSI instead of 80 PSI for a deck gun/master stream, rounding too early, or entering pump pressure instead of GPM.

problems.title: Deck Gun Flow: 1 3/8-inch Solid Bore
problems.question: Engine 181 is operating its deck gun with a 1 3/8-inch solid bore tip. Use 80 PSI nozzle pressure. What GPM is flowing from the deck gun?
problems.instructorExplanation: This is a deck gun solid bore flow problem, not a pump-pressure problem. Use the solid bore flow formula. With a 1 3/8-inch solid bore tip at 80 PSI nozzle pressure, the calculated flow is 502 GPM, rounded to 500 GPM.
problems.explainMistake: Common mistakes include using the pump-pressure formula instead of the solid bore flow formula, forgetting to square the tip diameter, using 50 PSI instead of 80 PSI for a deck gun/master stream, rounding too early, or entering pump pressure instead of GPM.
